Paper_or_discovery: LiCoO2 cathode for rechargeable lithium batteries
Beneficiary_role: Battery cell manufacturing; cathode/anode active materials; EV manufacturing; stationary storage deployment
Value_capture_channels: Manufacturing scale; supply-chain clustering; exports; domestic EV/storage demand
Estimate_basis: China captured major downstream and midstream lithium-ion battery value; IEA reports China had 70% of electric car production, over 80% of battery cell production, about 85% of cathode active material, and over 90% of anode active material in 2025.
Value_capture_notes: Applies to lithium-ion batteries broadly; LiCoO2 historical value was also captured by Japan/Korea/US/EU electronics firms.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Permanent magnet materials based on the rare earth-iron-boron tetragonal compounds
Beneficiary_role: Rare-earth refining; sintered NdFeB magnet manufacturing; EV motors; wind turbines; electronics supply chains
Value_capture_channels: Materials processing; magnet manufacturing; component supply; export leverage
Estimate_basis: IEA reports China produced 91% of refined magnet rare-earth output and 94% of sintered permanent magnets in 2024.
Value_capture_notes: Paper originated in Japan, but China captured much of the downstream magnet supply-chain value.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Organic electroluminescent diodes
Beneficiary_role: OLED/display-panel manufacturing; smartphone and consumer-electronics assembly; display supply-chain scaling
Value_capture_channels: Panel production; module integration; device assembly; domestic and export markets
Estimate_basis: Chinese OLED/display makers have become major smartphone display suppliers; Omdia coverage tracks Chinese and Korean OLED shipment volumes in 2025.
Value_capture_notes: South Korea historically captured large OLED value; China share is rising, so use sensitivity bands.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: 22.8% efficient silicon solar cell / passivated emitter rear cell architecture
Beneficiary_role: Solar PV wafer/cell/module manufacturing; PV manufacturing equipment; large-scale deployment
Value_capture_channels: Manufacturing capacity; exports; domestic installations; equipment supply
Estimate_basis: IEA says China’s share exceeds 80% across all solar-panel manufacturing stages and will approach 95% for key building blocks under capacity under construction.
Value_capture_notes: Paper originated in Australia; China captured much of PERC-era PV manufacturing value.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Near Shannon limit error-correcting coding and decoding: Turbo-codes
Beneficiary_role: Telecom equipment, mobile-network deployment, handset ecosystem, mobile data services
Value_capture_channels: Network infrastructure; standards implementation; mobile services; cloud/IoT applications
Estimate_basis: China had 4.838 million 5G base stations and about US$250.8B telecom business revenue in 2025; China also declared 42% of global 5G standard-essential patents.
Value_capture_notes: Turbo codes are earlier-generation channel coding; China benefit is via telecom platform adoption rather than paper-specific royalties.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Active pixel sensors: are CCDs dinosaurs?
Beneficiary_role: Device manufacturing; smartphone cameras; automotive/industrial vision; security-camera ecosystems
Value_capture_channels: Electronics manufacturing; camera module integration; phones; automotive/IoT vision
Estimate_basis: China benefits through large-scale electronics and camera-module supply chains; Yole notes China’s share rise in the CMOS image sensor landscape.
Value_capture_notes: Core image-sensor IP and high-end sensor profits remain globally distributed, especially Japan, US, Korea, Europe and Taiwan-linked supply chains.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Candela-class high-brightness InGaN/AlGaN double-heterostructure blue-light-emitting diodes
Beneficiary_role: LED lighting manufacturing; displays; automotive lighting; consumer electronics
Value_capture_channels: Lighting product manufacturing; exports; domestic efficiency mandates; device integration
Estimate_basis: China is a large LED lighting market and production base; market sources estimate major China participation in LED lighting demand and supply.
Value_capture_notes: Blue LED breakthrough originated in Japan; value capture is shared with Japan, Korea, Taiwan, US/EU brands and China manufacturing.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Layered space-time architecture for wireless communication in a fading environment when using multi-element antennas
Beneficiary_role: 4G/5G telecom equipment; massive mobile-network deployment; handset and mobile-service ecosystems
Value_capture_channels: Network equipment; mobile services; device supply chain; industrial internet
Estimate_basis: MIMO is a central wireless-network technology; China had 4.838 million 5G base stations, 1.204 billion 5G subscriptions, and 5G/industrial internet coverage across major categories by end-2025.
Value_capture_notes: Value also captured by US, Europe, Korea, Japan, India and global operators.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Phospho-olivines as positive-electrode materials for rechargeable lithium batteries
Beneficiary_role: LFP battery cell manufacturing; cathode active material; EV batteries; grid storage
Value_capture_channels: Battery supply chain; LFP cathode scaling; EV exports; stationary storage
Estimate_basis: China is the major global production hub for EV batteries and active materials; IEA reports over 80% battery cell production, about 85% cathode active material, and over 90% anode active material in 2025.
Value_capture_notes: LFP commercialization is especially associated with Chinese battery and EV scaling, though origin paper was from the US.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: The Google File System
Field_or_platform: Google File System / cloud data infrastructure
Beneficiary_role: Large-scale cloud/data infrastructure; China domestic cloud platforms; data centers; Internet services
Value_capture_channels: Cloud services; big data infrastructure; Internet platforms; data-center operations
Estimate_basis: China telecom/digital infrastructure data show cloud computing, big data, IoT and data centers as significant emerging businesses; Google-scale architecture influenced global cloud design patterns.
Value_capture_notes: Indirect ecosystem influence; not a direct China implementation of Google File System.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: MapReduce: simplified data processing on large clusters
Beneficiary_role: Big-data analytics; cloud data processing; domestic Internet platforms; enterprise analytics
Value_capture_channels: Cloud analytics; data pipelines; Internet-scale computation; data centers
Estimate_basis: MapReduce influenced Hadoop and cloud analytics worldwide; China’s digital infrastructure and cloud/big-data businesses are significant domestic value-capture channels.
Value_capture_notes: Indirect platform influence, not paper-specific revenue.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Bigtable: a distributed storage system for structured data
Beneficiary_role: Cloud databases; NoSQL platforms; large-scale structured-data storage
Value_capture_channels: Cloud database services; data-center platforms; Internet services
Estimate_basis: Bigtable influenced NoSQL/cloud storage systems; China’s data-center, cloud and big-data ecosystem is a significant beneficiary channel.
Value_capture_notes: Indirect influence; specific database products should be audited separately.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: ImageNet classification with deep convolutional neural networks / AlexNet
Beneficiary_role: Computer vision in manufacturing, phones, cameras, autonomous systems, retail and public-sector AI
Value_capture_channels: AI software; vision systems; edge AI; camera ecosystems; industrial automation
Estimate_basis: Stanford AI Index reports China leads in AI publication volume, citations and patent grants; China also has very large deployment channels in manufacturing and digital infrastructure.
Value_capture_notes: Revenue capture is global and difficult to isolate; US cloud/GPU firms capture large shares too.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Deep residual learning for image recognition / ResNet
Beneficiary_role: Computer vision platform research and deployment; Chinese-based origin via Microsoft Research Asia; manufacturing/robotics/AI use cases
Value_capture_channels: Research leadership; AI software; edge vision; industrial automation; camera/phone ecosystems
Estimate_basis: ResNet originated at Microsoft Research Asia in Beijing; Stanford AI Index reports China leads in AI publication volume, citations and patent grants.
Value_capture_notes: This row is both China-origin-linked and China-beneficiary-linked; Microsoft is a US-headquartered firm, so corporate value capture differs from location of research.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: You Only Look Once: unified, real-time object detection
Beneficiary_role: Real-time object detection in factories, robots, cameras, vehicles and retail analytics
Value_capture_channels: Edge AI; robotics; smart manufacturing; video analytics; automotive perception
Estimate_basis: China is the largest industrial-robot market and a major AI research/deployment country; YOLO-style detection is widely used in edge/computer-vision deployments.
Value_capture_notes: Open-source and model-family diffusion make revenue attribution diffuse.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Attention Is All You Need
Beneficiary_role: LLMs, generative AI applications, search/recommendation, enterprise AI, robotics and AI chips/infrastructure demand
Value_capture_channels: Foundation models; AI apps; cloud inference; data centers; enterprise productivity tools
Estimate_basis: Stanford AI Index reports China leads AI publications, citations and patent grants, while the US leads notable model development; China is therefore a major beneficiary but not sole capturer.
Value_capture_notes: US firms, Taiwan semiconductor manufacturing, Korea memory, and global cloud ecosystems capture large shares too.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: BERT: pre-training of deep bidirectional transformers for language understanding
Beneficiary_role: Search/NLP systems; recommendation; enterprise AI; Chinese-language NLP; customer-service and document AI
Value_capture_channels: NLP products; search/recommendation; enterprise AI; cloud AI APIs
Estimate_basis: BERT is part of the transformer/NLP platform; Stanford AI Index reports China leads in AI publications, citations and patent grants, supporting substantial China benefit through NLP deployment.
Value_capture_notes: Value capture is shared across US, China, Europe, India, Japan, Korea and global cloud/software providers.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Colloidal semiconductor nanocrystals / quantum dots paper family
Field_or_platform: Quantum dots / QD displays and nanomaterials
Beneficiary_role: Quantum-dot display supply chain; display materials; TV/monitor manufacturing; consumer electronics
Value_capture_channels: Display manufacturing; materials; device assembly; export markets
Estimate_basis: Quantum dots are a display-materials platform; global quantum-dot display market forecasts are multi-billion-dollar, and China has a major display manufacturing ecosystem.
Value_capture_notes: South Korea, Japan, US and Taiwan-linked firms also capture display/material value.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: ROS: an open-source Robot Operating System
Beneficiary_role: Industrial robotics software ecosystem; robot integration; automation services; robot manufacturing
Value_capture_channels: Robotics deployment; integrators; manufacturing automation; open-source software adoption
Estimate_basis: IFR reports China represented 54% of global industrial-robot deployments in 2024 and Chinese manufacturers held 57% of the domestic market.
Value_capture_notes: ROS is open-source; benefit is mainly productivity and ecosystem enablement rather than direct licensing.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Probabilistic SLAM / simultaneous localization and mapping paper family
Beneficiary_role: Robotics, drones, autonomous mobile robots, mapping, logistics automation and AR/vision systems
Value_capture_channels: Robot deployment; drones; warehouse automation; vehicle/robot perception; mapping
Estimate_basis: SLAM is a core autonomy method; IFR reports China is the largest industrial-robot market with 54% of deployments in 2024 and over 2 million robots in operation.
Value_capture_notes: Autonomous-vehicle, drone and logistics shares require additional product-level validation.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Denoising diffusion probabilistic models
Beneficiary_role: Generative AI image/video/content tools; design software; e-commerce/media applications
Value_capture_channels: AI apps; cloud inference; model deployment; creative tools; e-commerce content generation
Estimate_basis: Diffusion models are part of generative AI; Stanford AI Index reports China has broad AI research/patent leadership but the US leads in notable model development.
Value_capture_notes: Revenue is strongly shared with US cloud/platform firms and global AI application companies.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

Paper_or_discovery: Human-level control through deep reinforcement learning; Mastering the game of Go with deep neural networks and tree search
Beneficiary_role: AI research; robotics/control; game AI; optimization; autonomous systems
Value_capture_channels: AI talent/research; robotics; automation; optimization systems
Estimate_basis: Deep RL/AlphaGo catalyzed AI interest and research; Stanford AI Index reports China leads in AI research outputs, and IFR reports China leads industrial robot deployment.
Value_capture_notes: Commercial revenue is less direct than transformers or batteries; treat as a soft platform-benefit estimate.
Assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.
